カードの効果.発動効果: When applying the opponent’s Active Pokémon’s Weakness to damage from attacks used by Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) that aren’t Mega Evolution Pokémon ex, apply Weakness as ×2.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may only play 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name cant be played
